description_long: This object is a realistic crab with a robust, reddish-brown exoskeleton and a broad, slightly domed carapace. It features two prominent claws, with the left claw significantly larger and raised, displaying serrated edges. The crab has eight slender, jointed walking legs that extend outward, giving it a wide stance. Its eyes are set on short stalks at the front of the carapace, and several fine antennae are visible between the eyes. The underside and joints of the legs are lighter in color, transitioning from reddish hues to pale cream. The overall appearance is lifelike, with detailed texturing on the shell and limbs, making it suitable for urban food or seafood market scenes.
description: A lifelike reddish-brown crab with a large raised claw, eight jointed legs, and detailed shell texture. Eyes on stalks and fine antennae are visible at the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad carapace, both claws (left claw raised), eyes on stalks, and antennae clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large raised claw and the lateral extension of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the domed back of the carapace, the symmetrical arrangement of the legs, and the claws from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view with the smaller claw visible and the curvature of the body and legs apparent.
